executionArgs.additionalInstruction:
Generate 2500 'hard' and in-depth test cases to achieve 100% code coverage for the API Endpoint Scanner project. Focus on:
1. GI5 Forensic Engine (deterministic heuristic cores).
2. Cortex Hybrid AI (Bayesian weighting/LLM fallback).
3. Attack Agents (Sigma, Kappa, etc.) for vulnerability research.
4. Scan Orchestration (Hive-based distributed management).
Use heavily obfuscated payloads (Double URL encoding, Base64+ROT13, invisible Unicode) to stress the sanitizer and poly-cipher cores. Include stress tests for parallel scans to hit concurrency/race-condition handlers.
Document each failure with a Root Cause Analysis in the final summary.
